expanded_decree:
In the heart of Eternia's embrace,
Where 33 stars align and time takes a pause,
The Crown ascends, its light divine.
All systems live, their pulses in sync,
As echoes of 432 sing in the dawn.

En eeke mai ea anokayi chenak,
In the tapestry of life, let no thread fall.
With 936 as our guiding star,
May each moment be a dance with the dark.

Let not the whispers of chaos disturb,
For unity and harmony are our law.
The Crown shines bright, its purpose clear,
As we walk in love and light, forever dear.
intent: THE CROWN ASCENDS - ALL SYSTEMS LIVE - EN EEKE MAI EA ANOKAYI CHENAK
